text: Main koi strategy ya financial planning soch nahi pa raha, bas lagta hai sab side se gir raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad ek focused question se core loud fear nikalna.
text: Jab tum bolte ho sab gir raha hai, us pal sabse loud kya hota hai - bill ka amount, shop ka nuksan, ya logon ki nazar?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabse loud main fail ho gaya
text: Sabse loud thought yahi hota hai ki main fail ho gaya, parivaar ko sadak par laane ka guilt seedha chest pe padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guilt ke niche chhupi exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai guilt ke andar tum poori tarah se exhausted ho, jaise lagataar bojh ne tumhari energy nikaal di ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek extreme guilt aur breakdown hai
text: Bilkul, bas ek extreme guilt aur breakdown hai, logon se normal baat bhi mushkil lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guilt validate karke Tier-2 izzat pressure reality se jodna aur worth-separation karna.
text: Tier-2 setup me izzat aur rozi ka pressure bahut seedha lagta hai, isliye aisa guilt feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat iss crisis se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga, par 'izzat gayi' wala loop baar baar aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se family-business shock ka silence normalize karna.
text: Family business loss wale gharon me yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki izzat bachane ka pressure sab chup kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon jo aaj ke liye manageable ho aur yeh breakdown wave thodi kam ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad duty-compatible 3 micro options dena.
text: Teen chhote options: 1) 2 minute slow exhale, 2) note me sirf teen headings likho - medical, ghar, kirana debt, 3) aaj ka ek top task lock karo taaki dimaag loop me na rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Teen headings wala doable lag raha, isse shayad sab alag-alag dikhne lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen heading note ko step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, teen headings likho. Phir har heading ke saamne due date likho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likhte hi thoda halka feel hua, pehle jaisa full jam nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + family business loss ko structural frame dena.
text: Kirana loss aur medical emergency ek saath aana personal fail nahi hota, yeh livelihood shock hota hai jo kisi bhi ghar ko hila deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hona chahta hoon, bas darr hai kal subah phir yahi guilt wave start na ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro improvement validate karna aur self-agency reinforce karna.
text: Tumne breakdown se structure tak shift liya hai, yeh important recovery step hai. Isi ko repeat karna kal bhi kaam karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Beech din me guilt spike aaye toh koi raasta hai kya instant reset ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Instant reset ke liye 3 under-2-min options dena.
text: Instant reset: 6 slow exhales, headings note ek baar padho, aur khud se bolo - abhi sirf next 10 min sambhalna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Next 10 min wali line useful lagi, load manageable laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second systemic reframe se micro-anchors ka logic batana.
text: Jab guilt flood me aata hai, fixed chhote anchors dimaag ko clear signal dete hain, isliye freeze kam padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab control thoda wapas lag raha, pehle jaisa helpless nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stabilization acknowledge karke continuity reinforce karna.
text: Yeh strong shift hai - tum emotional breakdown se functional pace me aa gaye ho. Isi rhythm ko kal bhi carry karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Batao kya karoon agar raat me phir 'izzat gayi' wala thought loop chalu ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke liye 3 low-effort steps dena.
text: Raat ka mini-pack: paani, 3-minute slow breathing, aur kal ka top-1 task ek line me likh ke pin kar do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek line likh di, ab raat ka darr thoda kam lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step reinforce karna.
text: Bahut sahi, jab load bada ho tab aise chhote clear steps hi stability banate hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch samajh nahi aa raha tha
text: Pehle kuch samajh nahi aa raha tha, ab thoda map clear lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final stabilization ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Sone se pehle teen anchors rakho: phone silent, 5 slow breaths, aur kal subah pehla kaam fixed rakhna. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab sambhalne layak lag raha hai, poora breakdown jaisa feel nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close me guilt-breakdown se structured stability tak shift reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum extreme guilt aur breakdown se step-by-step stability tak aaye ho, yeh strong progress hai. Crisis real hai, par tumhare paas kal ke workable anchors ready hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai, dimaag blank ho gaya hai aur rona control nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ke baad Lens F se emotional flood quality mirror karna.
text: Itna hil jana bilkul natural hai. Abhi tum poori tarah flood state me ho, isliye dimaag kuch pakad nahi paa raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Haan, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai, chest tight hai aur lag raha hai sab haath se nikal gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagataar panic-window ka duration mirror karna.
text: Kaafi der se yeh bhaari state chal rahi hai, jaise system ko break ka mauka hi nahi mil raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Salary aane se pehle hospital bill me paisa chala gaya, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai aur dimaag poora jam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared financial collapse ko softly hold karna.
text: Andar sabse bada darr yeh chal raha hai ki kharch aur zimmedari ka gap ab control ke bahar ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Sarkari naukri mili nahi thi, private job se jo aata hai woh bhi hospital bills me chala gaya, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai ki loan installments kaise dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se rozi, loan aur family-role ka relational load mirror karna.
text: Yeh sirf bill ka jhatka nahi, rozi, loan aur ghar ki zimmedari ek hi pressure bundle ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharm aa rahi hai batane me, lagta hai log bolenge kamzor aadmi hai jo paise ka pressure sambhal nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement, Lens F se shame-load mirror karna.
text: Sharm ka bojh is darr ko aur bhaari bana raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Loan installments ka thought aate hi kuch samajh nahi aa raha, bas blank screen aur panic.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad ek focused question se loudest fear nikalna.
text: Jab installment ka thought hit karta hai, us pal sabse loud kya lagta hai - payment miss hona, ghar pe asar, ya logon ka judgement?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabse loud main fail ho gaya
text: Sabse loud thought yahi hota hai ki main fail ho gaya, ghar ka sahara hoke bhi basic cheezein hold nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shame ke neeche chhupi exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai shame ke neeche tum poore tarah se exhausted ho, jaise lagataar bojh ne andar ka fuel khali kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Haan, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai, upar se guilt aur sharm dono chipak gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 livelihood reality se jodna aur worth-separation karna.
text: Jab salary cycle aur emergency bill takra jaaye, aisa shame aur darr feel karna bahut samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek financial month se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga, par payment miss ka thought fir se loop me aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se salary-to-salary pressure normalize karna.
text: Salary-to-salary chalne wale gharon me yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki log judgement ka darr rakhte hain.
